emails.subject: Re: Monday Call
emails.body: Re: Monday Call I have an am dr appt. Fine with me if you carry on and give me an assignment. Otherwise, it woukd nedd to be early or after 100. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>
